title: M2CContextPolicy
description: Metadata carried by each context fragment that declares its isolation constraints: intended audience, temporal scope, modalities, and priority (spec/v0.2/supply.md §5.2).

audience.description: Roles that SHOULD receive this context. Empty array means all roles.

modalities.description: Source types included in this context fragment

priority.description: Priority weight (0.0–1.0). Higher-priority fragments are kept when budget is tight.
